description: Machine-readable state for all reports in this directory. Agents read this to know what has been addressed and what is pending. Severity mapping for code-review reports: must_fix->critical, should_fix->medium, nice->low.

security/2026-06-27-initial-security-rev.notes: Superseded by 2026-06-28 comprehensive audit. Its 3 medium findings (JWT default guard, trigger API key separation, SSRF allowlist) are re-scoped there as S4/S2/S3.

code-review/2026-06-27-initial-code-revi.notes: Superseded by 2026-06-28 comprehensive code review. Findings re-scoped there.

security/2026-06-28-comprehensive-securi.notes: All 18 remediated + merged to main (701d34a). S15 (get_qr/connect stubs) implemented via EvolutionAdapter. S14 out of scope → covered by C19. 82/82 tests green, ruff clean. Branch security/s1-s18-remediation merged via fast-forward.

code-review/2026-06-28-comprehensive-cod.notes: 10/21 fixed. MUST-FIX (7/7): C1-C7 done + verified. SHOULD-FIX (1/8): C8 (shared httpx client — Anthropic, OpenAI, Evolution adapters + DeclaredHttpTool) done via ed8f46e. Mypy real errors (3) fixed, ruff line-length 100→120 + all lint clean (0 errors). S15 (get_qr/connect/disconnect) implemented, allowed_hosts documented in seeds. Remaining: C9 single metrics query, C11 pagination, C12 GuardPipeline wired, C14 lock heartbeat, C16 guards polymorphic check, C18 evolution shared dataclasses, C19 Pydantic request models, C20 test/CI infra, C21 takeover→human_active.
